query:
ALTER TABLE users 
MODIFY COLUMN openId VARCHAR(64) NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS password VARCHAR(255) NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone VARCHAR(20) NULL,
ADD UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_email (email);
